name: calendar-01
title: Calendar 01
author: ilinxa
description: Editable calendar over the canonical TodoItem[] — the date-grid sibling of gantt-timeline-01. Four views: a month grid (multi-day spanning bars + chips + "+N more", height-responsive overflow), week & day hour time-grids (all-day band + lane-packed timed blocks + now-line), and a day-grouped agenda. Opt-in editing (editable, default off): drag-to-reschedule, edge-resize, draw/double-click create, a quick-composer, a right-click menu, an inspector + modal detail editor, inline rename, full keyboard editing, and cross-surface copy/cut/paste that carries tasks through the OS clipboard to gantt / kanban / tree (paste-target decides all-day vs timed). All-day vs timed vs milestone is derived (consumer predicate → date-only strings parsed floating-local → span heuristic); status-driven event color is imported from todo-rich-card so it matches the card + gantt. Controlled-echo (no internal data state) gated by the shared TodoPermissions matrix. Ships shadcn-style: a batteries-included <Calendar01> plus a headless <Calendar01Root> + flat à-la-carte view parts + edit overlays + Tier-C primitives, so a month-only subset drops the week/day time-grid code.
